entity.name: InAlgo project maintainers
entity.description: Maintainers of InAlgo, an MIT-licensed open-source intraday trading workstation for Indian equity and F&O markets. Funding supports project maintenance, documentation, CI and test infrastructure, sanitized demos, and ongoing open-source development. InAlgo is not financial advice and funding does not purchase trading recommendations, live signal access, or investment services.

projects.name: InAlgo
projects.description: InAlgo is an open-source, local-first trading workstation for Indian equity and F&O markets, with strategy development, intraday backtesting, paper/live execution monitoring, market-watch signals, option-chain analysis, historical OHLCV data, trigger operations, and P&L review.

channels.description: Contact the InAlgo project maintainers for approved sponsorship or support payment details before sending funds.

plans.name: General project support
plans.description: Supports open-source maintenance, documentation, CI and test infrastructure, sanitized demo assets, and contributor onboarding. This does not provide financial advice, trading signals, or live trading services.
